chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1593 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of main case 20-05-2025 Mr. Hamayoun Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondents-SEPCO. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, D.A.G. **** Counsel for petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition and submits that petitioner will file proper application in Const. Petition No.D-1182 of 2018. Order accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
